reviews.review_description:
The quality isn’t anything like the video.
Also, half the time it doesn’t even let me grasp the joystick to control the plane. Don’t even try.
Thankfully, I got it on sale for $1.20.

reviews.review_title: Good game, but any motion controls?
reviews.review_description: A system where you can actually move the joystick would be cool in both planes and helicopters, and also a free flight to test planes and stuff you haven't bought (you can also use weapons in them) but of course you won't be able to do missions in the aircraft you haven't unlocked but test them in free flight
I really love the game so much it's the first warplane game that I ever played in my life.

developer_response.body: Thanks Galactic, Sure, in future update it will be more joyful experience. Keep playing.

reviews.review_description:
Very good game, can’t wait for more development. My problems are the tutorial seems to be broken. I’m also teleported around the cockpit and have to move in real life to correct. Fix and 5stars all the way.

Fixed my rating. There are buttons like the one on the chair the ports you around the cockpit. That needs to be pointed out or added to tutorial. Great game, keep it up. Would love to see a jet!

developer_response.body:
Hi willieD07,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for enjoying our game — we truly value players like you! We’re happy to assist, but unfortunately we couldn’t reproduce the tutorial or cockpit movement issue during our testing. Just incase of direction and physical position we move, it can be relocate by "Home" button.

To help us fix this and get that 5-star experience you deserve, could you please share more details with us? You can reach us directly on Discord or via email at contact@lmstudio.games. Your feedback is incredibly important, and we’d love to resolve this for you as soon as possible.

Thanks again for playing and supporting us!

— LM Game Studio Team
EDIT : 
Thanks, We really value your feedback and make "Return to cockpit" button  more visible and poited for ease. Of course Jet will take off next month.

reviews.review_description: I really liked this game. It was awesome, the great thing is all about it's graphics (outstanding).
This game is really fun to play, and the graphics are also perfect This was the first ever game I played for fighter jets.

Sitting in the cockpit feels like stepping into a real fighter jet—the dials, levers, and HUD glow around you Pulling a hard turn to dodge missiles while hearing your engine roar in 3D audio creates true VR tension.
I’ve had a lot of fun playing the 5 levels, when you add more, could you add free flight?

developer_response.body:
Gunzilla1212, Thanks for review. Glad that tou enjoy playing game.
Sure, we have a plan for free flight in upcoming versions.

reviews.review_description: Amazing helicopter battle game with wonderful graphics and a very smooth and incredible gameplay.The helicopters are unique but they are hard to achieve.More over, it has tons of contents to play with which is really unbelievable to get.

Iron Wings: Air Combat is a challenging and rewarding VR sim that puts you in full control of realistic helicopters. Piloting isn’t easy at first — and that’s the point! The detailed cockpits are impressive, and each helicopter feels unique. I’m still mastering the first one, but the learning curve is part of the fun.

Missions alternate between scanning and engaging targets, switching roles between pilot and onboard gunner. It really gives off strong Airwolf vibes for fans of classic chopper action. If you enjoy true simulation, this is one of those titles that make VR shine — immersive, tough, and incredibly satisfying.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind word and appriciation. Till we are working on it to make better and have more fun.

reviews.review_description: This game is very Cool helicopter shooting for me great game for me realistic graphics and sounds is good the helicopter controller is smooth
for some reason it adds damage when i turn on anything in the air like radar. Also would be cool to move the in game joystick rather then your little one on your controller. Other then that its fun
